Client-side sorting copies the data and costs O(n log n); row ID generation and selection checks are generally O(n). toggleAll uses repeated every, includes, and filtering operations and may approach O(n*m). Async fetching uses AbortController, debounced filters, stale-update suppression, and effect dependencies; cleanup suppresses updates, while the previous request is explicitly aborted when the next effect executes. The component contains substantial conditional JSX for accessibility states, keyboard sorting, selection, and a five-button pagination window."}
